title: senecio joharchii
intro: Senecio joharchii, also known as Joharchi's ragwort or Iranian wormwood, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Senecio joharchii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Senecio joharchii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
